scripts.dev:worker: npm run build && npx wrangler d1 execute task-manager-db --local --file=schema.sql && npx wrangler dev --local --ip localhost --port 8788 --live-reload false
scripts.dev:worker:live: npm run build && npx wrangler d1 execute task-manager-db --local --file=schema.sql && concurrently -k -n watch,wrangler -c cyan,magenta "node scripts/debounced-vite-build.mjs" "npx wrangler dev --local --ip localhost --port 8788 --live-reload false"
scripts.test:verify: npm test && npm run lint && npm run test:e2e
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
